Mmu.NuGetLicenceBuddy 1.0.51+cae0f7102a5eddbae54ec39f81b8707dc1d85c25
Copyright (C) 2026 DrMueller

  -a, --allowed-licences           Comma-seperated list, for example
                                   'mit,apache-2'. If none is provided, all
                                   licences are allowed.

  -e, --exclude-packages-filter    RegEx to exclude packages from analyzing.
                                   Must be escaped for Azure DevOps, see
                                   https://www.robvanderwoude.com/escapechars.ph
                                   p. Example: '.*(Microsoft^|System).*
                                   '.

  -i, --include-transitive         (Default: false) Include distinct transitive
                                   package licenses.

  -m, --match-output-version       (Default: false) If true, only the versions
                                   in the output folders are used. Required
                                   output-path option.

  -o, --output-path                Path of the produced artifacts.

  -s, --sources-path               Required. Source path to search the
                                   'project.assets.json' in.

  --help                           Display this help screen.

  --version                        Display version information.

##vso[task.complete result=Failed;]Task failed due to an error.
